title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.42 — DEFERRED PATINA SURFACES + CHASSIS MOCKUP ROUND 1 (user: 'the painted-metal chassis mockup round, the deferred patina surfaces'). PATINA (UI-only, no version gates): the EP:: aging pass now covers every surface from the deferred-audit list — TweakWindow chrome (EP::panel 'TWEK' 0.8), OUTPUT EQ shell (EP::panel 'OEQ1' 0.9) + graph GLASS treatment (grime 0.40 + dust 0.50 — screens dust, they don't chip; curve stays readable), AGE LFO scope glass (grime 0.35 + dust 0.45), LicenseOverlay scrim (grime 0.35), ThetaLogo badge (dust 0.40), preset combo (edgeWear+dust in CreosoteLAF::drawComboBox), and a new WornButtonLAF (PluginEditor.h) on the 4 header buttons + 3 bottom tabs — stock fill/hover behavior plus edgeWear 0.55 + dust 0.45, seeded per button name, dosed to keep 9px labels legible; attached in ctor, detached in dtor per the existing LAF teardown pattern. The EQ inspector knobs and AGE LFO knobs deliberately stay clean (their ring/halo language is a display instrument, not chassis). CHASSIS: 4 painted-metal finishes mocked as an HTML artifact (V1 Reactor Sage / V2 Naval Teal / V3 MOCR Grey-Green / V4 Two-Tone teal+sage), each rendered with the real hardware (lit-lens tiles, emerald, purple ON, blank plate) + static baked enamel grain/chip maps — AWAITING STEVE'S PICK before any JUCE port. OPEN: chassis pick -> port with EP:: aging; LIMITER rename.
